title: Implement optimizer state/UI rename + cycles table mode columns + cost/item

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation on branch codex/recent-regression-procedure-dashboard. Scope includes hard-cutover state contract rename (Recent/Regression), ProcedureTask table mode/columns, OptimizerMetricsChart toggle rename + synchronization, MCP evaluation accuracy payload parity for cost/items, storage projection updates, and rerun validation on procedure 6c152581-2e1c-4fbf-b4ea-27a2b06a2cb4 after canceling in-flight task.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented hard-cutover contract rename to recent/regression in optimizer YAML + dashboard state projection + ProcedureTask parsing; added cycles-table mode sync with Overall/Recent/Regression and mode-specific columns (overall includes AC1/Acc deltas + cost/item, recent/regression includes AC1/Acc/P/R); added cost-per-item extraction/propagation from eval payload; updated MCP accuracy payload to include cost/processed_items/total_items; added/updated unit tests and typecheck/pytest runs passing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying final UI color tweak for Recent/Regression cycle headers, validating continue-feature availability on develop, then starting 200-sample 10-cycle run.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Switched to develop, confirmed continue/branch UI and backend code are present; continue action is gated to COMPLETED procedures. Restarting optimizer test run at 200 samples and 10 cycles.
